ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = False, $User.Alias <> 'IntUser', $User.Alias <> 'guest', ISBLANK(Sub_Reason_Lost_Free_Text__c ), OR( ISPICKVAL(Sub_Reason_Lost_1__c,"Occupation Not Covered"), ISPICKVAL(Sub_Reason_Lost_1__c,"Jurisdiction"), ISPICKVAL(Sub_Reason_Lost_2__c,"Other") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: OV1: A Sub-Reason Lost Free Text is required
